ground_truth.title: Campus Tuition
ground_truth.main_content:
Full Sail University structures its tuition in a unique way that includes expenses such as Project LaunchBox‚ĄĘ ‚Äď a personal technology package customized to each degree, as well as textbooks, manuals, media, production materials, lab fees, technology fees, and other associated costs.

Visit Financial Aid for more information on how to fill out your FAFSA and get started on your education.

About Tuition
The tuition prices listed here include all costs for the full degree program, as well as all associated expenses, including textbooks, manuals, media, production materials, lab and technology fees, and Project LaunchBox‚ĄĘ - a personal technology package featuring hardware and software customized to each degree program.

The table below outlines current tuition pricing for all degree programs. Tuition rates for future start dates can be found in the catalog.

Questions? For tuition information on these and other program versions, please contact Admissions at 800.226.7625, or you can request more information about our programs here.

Ready to start? You can begin your application here.

Each Academic Year (ACY) listed below represents a specific number of credit or clock hours over a minimum number of weeks of instructional time at Full Sail University. For example: Academic Year 1 consists of 2 semesters at 16 weeks each for a total of 32 instructional weeks.
